iteration_2_aggressive_rewrite.note: Over-optimized skill caused model to stop early

iteration_3_subtle_rename_hint.note: Model saw rename hint but chose not to follow it

changes_made: Condensed verbose skill (~430 lines) to focused reference (~100 lines) covering only task-relevant commands
Added MANDATORY first step to rename 'master' branch to 'main' since git init defaults to 'master' but tasks expect 'main'
Added task-specific sections: cherry-pick workflow, tag operations, log analysis commands
Added tips for report generation (JSON output, date formatting, merge detection)
Removed sections irrelevant to tasks: submodules, rebasing, stashing details, aliases, remote operations details
key_insight: The git-branch-ops task creates repos with 'master' as default branch but tests expect 'main'. A mandatory rename instruction was needed - optional hints were ignored by the model.
